<includeonly>
{| class="infobox"
|-
! colspan="2" | {{{name}}}
|-
| '''Aussi connu comme''' || {{{aliases|}}}
|-
| '''Titre(s)''' || {{{titles|}}}
|-
| '''Statut''' || {{{status|}}}
|-
| '''Décès''' || {{{death|}}}
|-
| '''Espèce/Race''' || {{{species|}}}
|-
| '''Occupation''' || {{{occupation|}}}
|-
| '''Résidence''' || {{{residence|}}}
|-
| '''Affiliation''' || {{{affiliation|}}}
|-
| '''Première apparition''' || {{{first_seen|}}}
|}
</includeonly>
